_comment: Example config for cmd/api. JSON does not support comments, so _comment fields are documentation and are ignored by the Go loader.

http._comment: addr is the API listen address. allowed_origins controls browser CORS and WebSocket origin checks.

nats._comment: NATS is used by the API realtime bridge to subscribe to workflow events and broadcast them over WebSockets.

sqlite._comment: SQLite database file read by the API.

websocket._comment: Heartbeat interval for connected browser and Electron clients.

realtime._comment: When enabled, the API subscribes to these NATS subjects and forwards matching events to subscribed WebSocket clients.
